description: Debridement, subcutaneous tissue, first 20 sq cm or less
rationale: The procedure, performed in the operating room, explicitly documents the debridement of necrotic skin and subcutaneous tissue.
official_description: CPT code 11042 is for the debridement of subcutaneous tissue for wounds up to 20 square centimeters or less.

description: Negative pressure wound therapy, > 50 sq cm
rationale: The note describes the detailed application of a VAC system to a large wound extending from the right axilla to the abdomen, indicating a surface area greater than 50 sq cm.
